feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Trans Tim Drake (DCU) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Never a daughter, Never a sister
entry.summary:
Author: timdrakegivesmegenderenvy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,413Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 81

Summary: How Tim Drake came out to each family member :3 (this is VERY MUCH just for me, i LOVE trans tim content) ps the only canon i’ve read is the first batgirls comic, batman legends of the dark knight, all 4 knightfight comics and the wayne family adventures webtoon, 99% of this is fanon.

entry.title: ‘Cause I’ve got nothing else to do
entry.summary:
Author: silly_guy83

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,497Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 313

Summary: He didn’t even know why he tried anymore. It’s not like anyone was there to care about him relapsing, or even taking his own life. He tries to think of someone who would care. Dick maybe? But the more he thought about it the more he realized Dick was just too nice to shun him like the rest. Bruce wouldn’t care. He had a new Robin now a new son, a real son.Or: Tim is going through it when a certain crime lord breaks in through his window bleeding out from a stab wound

entry.title: Kon-el’s Ultimate Guide Book to Surviving Another Universe
entry.summary:
Author: Alphaghetti_24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,975Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 96

Summary: Imagine you’re walking down the street then suddenly BOOM! you've been blasted into a new universe. Yeah right! As if! Well… not as if for Kon. He’s really gonna kick himself later for this… Nevertheless, he’s gotta try and figure this shit out and hopefully get home before his friends follow him to this other world ready to commit heinous war crimes. He’s really… really… hopeful that doesn’t happen. -OR- Kon-el is sent to the Young Justice Cartoon world! (Rewrite of Skyrocket’s guide to surviving another universe)

entry.title: Short term choices, long term consequences
entry.summary:
Author: Sparklin_star

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,114Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 190

Summary: 5 months ago, superboy died 4 months ago, Batman was also presumed dead Few days ago, Tim got the most life changing news so far Few weeks after Batman was saved, Tim disappeared

entry.title: Tim Drake's Guardian Angel
entry.summary:
Author: n4tcrack3r

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,451Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 305

Summary: Someone is stalking Tim Drake.This would be worrisome, if Tim didn’t know who it was. If he didn’t know who it was, it would be someone smart enough to evade Red Robin, the Bat’s third partner who had wormed his way into the dangerous life of a vigilante, who had proven himself time and time again to be a threateningly intelligent and formidable enemy.But he knew who it was, so he wasn’t worried. He was terrified.Or: Tim Drake comes into (unwilling) contact with an old adversary and has to relive past (and present) trauma.

entry.title: How Much Sorrow Can I Take?
entry.summary:
Author: m0thman

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,104Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 119

Summary: Tim Drake gets hit with cuddle pollen and has to deal with the effects infront of the people he wishes he could be closer with, but knows that it's not possibleakatim drake fucking strugglesakamy first batfam fic as someone who is obsessed with tims relationships and how his parents could've affected him :)

entry.title: Under The Willow
entry.summary:
Author: CarinoEresUnAmor

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,597Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Red Robin, report."Bruce's voice filtered in through his comms as Tim tries to pry his eyes open, glancing around at his surroundings."I-"Tim started, wincing at the pain pounding against his skull. Wires, were the first thing he could recognize, they practically surrounded him, some stuck to his arms through his ripped sleeve like an IV would, some coming down from his head.He can't escape.

entry.title: Illusion of the Heart
entry.summary:
Author: dodgedriftdietrying

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,159Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 394

Summary: Part of Bernard wanted to say he should have known when both of his boyfriends had ‘emergencies’ come up early this morning, but he knew better. When both of your partners are superheros who think you don’t know that, families are constantly in danger, ill or moving, work always runs late and old friends are constantly in town. It was bad when they were just dating, in the past 3 months that they’ve been living together, it has become downright comical. There was no way for him to know this particular crisis would involve his own secrets as well.

entry.title: The Art Of Internet Conspiracies: The Collision Of Worlds
entry.summary:
Author: Rosemaryy15

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,161Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 44

Summary: When Percy joined the internet, through phones made by the Hephaestus Cabin, he didn't think he, current friends, and friends made along the way, would cause such chaos. When Danny joined the internet, on a phone modified by Tucker and supplied to Amity via Vlad to circumvent ghostly interference, he didn't think he'd make friends with so many chaos gremlins, one of which, he is. When Tim Drake-Wayne made a point to make friends with all the teenage people related to their own massive (blowing up and jumping off the St. Louis Gateway Arch at twelve) issues, he didn't expect valid reasons, more cults, less heroism, and vigilantism, of it's own kind. When Peter Parker-Stark allowed his adoptive father, Tony Stark, to announce his adoption. he didn't think he'd be the chaos gremlin his friends say he is, being more a mother chaos gremlin. Nor did he think he'd meet people like him, err, similar to him. In regards of chaos. Harry Potter finally got his friend, Hermione Granger, to agree to helping him put runes in phones, subsequently getting muggle technology to run off of magic and work properly. Then, he did as any normal teenage does and took to Twitter with chaos.

entry.title: Catgirls Can Have A Little Theft, As A Treat
entry.summary:
Author: atomicpanda

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,522Chapters: 56/?Kudos: 492

Summary: Waking up as a tween catgirl in the DCU, a self insert into Gotham experiences the thrills of the masked nightlife, fails to combat her new urge to steal, and fails to combat her new feline instincts, all while working towards her goal of bringing good music to a Deathworld. Armed with the power of adorableness and also a deck of cards that hold a unique path to Power, Allison "AlleyKat" Kyle may not shake the world, but she sure as heck is going to knock it off the ledge.

entry.title: 4 Times Jason Mother Hens Tim + 1 Time Tim Pays Him Back
entry.summary:
Author: Dust_Bunny_Meow

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,456Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1,139

Summary: The first time it happened, Tim assumes he's misunderstanding something. Jason, up to this point, made it perfectly clear that he wanted nothing to do with Tim. He had stopped being outright antagonistic, but wasn't particularly friendly, either. So sharing a snack with him during patrol? Not a chance. or Jason takes care of Tim and Tim is baffled

entry.title: The selfish martyr
entry.summary:
Author: Piratecoreart

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,936Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Jason wants Tim. He shouldn't have him. But if he's helping, if he's making him safer, then it's okay, right? Tim needs this. The rest, the release, the lack of control. He will get it however he can. But if it's with Jason, someone who already knows who and what he is, it'll be okay, right? Aka: when you both want the same thing but somehow play the guilt Olympics to figure out who's worse because God forbid you just enjoy it.

entry.title: I've Never Been A Father (But Now I'm Yours)
entry.summary:
Author: straw_eri_chan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,765Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 490

Summary: Dick had been ignoring Bruce for two months now.He hadn't been Robin for eight, and two months ago, decided he needed a break. A letter in the mail gives him a lot more than that.ORDick Grayson hasn't spoken to his father in two months. Now he's invited to his funeral. He has to pick up everything Bruce left behind.

entry.title: This View of You (Only I Get to See)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,870Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: "What do you want tonight, baby?" he asks, tracing one of the scars on Jason's cheek with his thumb, looking deep into his hungry blue eyes. Jason's Adam's apple bobs, cheeks so adorably pink when he mutters, "Want you in me." Tim blinks, then smiles up at him. "Yeah? Is that what my sweet boy wants?" The pink tip of Jason's tongue flicks out, wetting his lower lip, and he nods. A rare treat. Jason's pretty new to bottoming. He'd been reluctant… almost embarrassed to admit he wanted to try it at first. It took a lot of gentle reassurance before he was fully comfortable exploring it. Even now, he doesn't ask for it a lot, so Tim savors the moments when they come. "Alright."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: “Heron, Whose Ghost Are You?”
entry.summary:
Author: Aaronymous9

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,988Chapters: 18/95Kudos: 450

Summary: Tim Drake accidentally creates a baby with his and Kon’s DNA while trying to bring him back from the dead. He decides his best course of action is to fake his death and start a new life as a single father. Or, Typical Timkon Clone Baby AU that tackles themes of queerness, self-discovery, the ethics of fighting crime, and what it means to be a good father.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Young Just Us (Against The World)
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,157Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 60

Summary: A few months after Batman's abuse, the Bats sent Tim off to join the team, Young Justice. Secrets get revealed, couches get burnt, two evil scientists become best friends, a toaster gains sentience, and unbreakable bonds are formed. Or: The Chaos Crew has finally arrived.

entry.title: Young Justice Can Have a Little Evil As a Treat
entry.summary:
Author: Brownies96

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,700Chapters: 32/35Kudos: 1,657

Summary: Tim snorts, “Right. Obviously, that’s not the full story, but you were in space so we’re good.” He activates the tablet and shows Hal familiar paperwork. “I’ve come to the conclusion that if the League is going to treat me like I’m an unstable rogue, they’re going to have to commit to the bit.”After being treated like unwanted children all their lives, Tim, Kon, Cassie, and Bart start to realise that the adulthood set out before them isn't much better than the past their leaving behind. They decide it's time to make their own way in the world, even if it means being labelled as 'evil'

entry.title: I'll Cover You
entry.summary:
Author: Lancelot15

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,483Chapters: 13/32Kudos: 99

Summary: Tim Drake is Transgender, and he was pretty sure he was completely and utterly alone in that.That is until his friend Kon-El comes out to him during a late night talk.Suddenly, the two find themselves looking out for each other and beginning to care about each other in different ways than before.(I suck at summaries)

entry.title: Imperfect Resurrection
entry.summary:
Author: Neptune_09

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,816Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Timothy Jackson Drake is coming apart in ways he can’t explain out loud. Everything feels like it’s speeding up—days blurring together, conversations slipping past him—and no one else seems to notice. Or worse, they notice and don’t care. He can feel himself being replaced. It makes sense, doesn’t it? Bruce has a real son now. Blood. Legacy. Something that actually belongs. Not something that had to force its way in, not something temporary. Why would Bruce hold onto him when he has that? Tim tries to tell himself he’s imagining it, that it’s just stress, just pressure—but the thought won’t leave. It sits there, constant, heavy, impossible to ignore. And underneath all of it, there’s something else. Something quieter, but worse. Grief that never really left. If Kon were still here, things would make sense. Kon would say something stupid just to make him laugh, or call him out for overthinking everything. He’d know what to do. He always did. But he’s not here. And Tim can’t fix any of this. Except maybe—maybe that’s not true. Maybe there *is* a way to fix it. He just hasn’t found it yet.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
